bar.headline: fraction-met over expectations 3+4 (hard pair); full fraction-met secondary
bar.judge_policy: dual-judge (opus pipeline + grok-4.5 re-grade); bars evaluated on opus; judge disagreement on a bar => bar NOT MET; never averaged (ADR 0057 d2)

cost.note: A and C from I2's measured grid (same config/scenarios); D filled by the pilot before the gate runs; runtime backstop halts resumable over ceiling

iterations.edit_surface: probe prompts/shape only, one targeted edit per iteration, D cells re-run, C/A cached
